company.description: PT Bussan Auto Finance ("BAF") is one of the leading financing company in Indonesia focusing on new Yamaha brand motorcycle, used motorcycle, Sharia financing, Car, Multi-Products(electronics & home appliances), agricultural machinery, Pradana, and Adidana. In running its business, BAF is registered and supervised by Financial Service Authority (OJK) and member of Indonesia Financing Company Association (APPI) and Credit Bureau. With more than 24 years of existence, BAF has served 8.2 million customers and is supported by ± 8.200 employees in 248 locations across Indonesia.
company.name: Bussan Auto Finance

companyInfo.description: PT Bussan Auto Finance ("BAF") is one of the leading financing company in Indonesia focusing on new Yamaha brand motorcycle, used motorcycle, Sharia financing, Car, Multi-Products(electronics & home appliances), agricultural machinery, Pradana, and Adidana. In running its business, BAF is registered and supervised by Financial Service Authority (OJK) and member of Indonesia Financing Company Association (APPI) and Credit Bureau. With more than 24 years of existence, BAF has served 8.2 million customers and is supported by ± 8.200 employees in 248 locations across Indonesia.
companyInfo.name: Bussan Auto Finance

jobs.description:
Responsibilities:

  • Monitoring and recording the entry and exit of IT assets (hardware, software, application systems) and documented them in the database/system.
  • Manage the asset life cycle process, from purchasing, installation, maintenance, and asset disposal/disposal.
  • Follow up the expiration date and ensure all software/hardware is not expired.
  • Perform memo approval processes and monitor the PKS (Work Agreement) for IT assets.
  • Communicate with internal and vendors regarding IT assets.
  • Prepare weekly and monthly reports related to the asset life cycle process.
jobs.name: IT Asset Management Staff
jobs.qualifications:
Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Information System, Computer Science, IT, or related field with a minimum of 1 year of relevant experience in system application and programming language
  • A detail oriented person with a background as an IT
  • Fluency in English is essential, Microsoft Office, and familiar with IT knowledge of hardware, software, and programming language
  • Passionate about IT asset administration (computer, hardware, server, and application) and data analysis
  • Willing to contract under Outsourcing

company.description: Odoo is a Belgium-based company with 19 offices and over 4,800+ employees worldwide. With a mission to improve efficiency and performance for every business, Odoo offers an all-in-one open-source software that includes 80+ business applications such as Sales, Accounting, Manufacturing, Inventory, and more. Flexible for businesses of all sizes and industries, and with prices 3x more affordable than traditional competitors (like SAP and Microsoft), Odoo has become the go-to choice for business owners in Indonesia!
company.name: Odoo

companyInfo.description: Odoo is a Belgium-based company with 19 offices and over 4,800+ employees worldwide. With a mission to improve efficiency and performance for every business, Odoo offers an all-in-one open-source software that includes 80+ business applications such as Sales, Accounting, Manufacturing, Inventory, and more. Flexible for businesses of all sizes and industries, and with prices 3x more affordable than traditional competitors (like SAP and Microsoft), Odoo has become the go-to choice for business owners in Indonesia!
companyInfo.name: Odoo

jobs.description:
Your responsibilities include:

  • Drive sales growth through implementing partners, ensuring they meet or exceed assigned revenue targets and KPIs.
  • Build and execute joint business plans with each partner — aligning on goals, sales strategies, and target markets.
  • Regularly review partner pipelines, identify opportunities, and provide guidance to accelerate deal closures.
  • Actively join partners in customer meetings, sales calls, demos, and other activities to support co-selling, product positioning, and negotiation with end clients.”
  • Monitor and report on partner sales performance, forecast accuracy, and activity levels.
  • Collaborate with the Partner Manager and internal teams (Sales, Marketing, Technical) to enable and empower partners for success.
  • Maintain high standards of partner performance — balancing support and accountability.
  • Represent the voice of partners internally, ensuring they have the right tools and resources to grow.

addressComponents.addressLine_1: Jalan Damai Foresta, Sampora Kel., Cisauk

jobs.name: Partner Growth & Enablement Executive
jobs.qualifications:
Must Have:

  • Min. Bachelor degree or higher
  • Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia
  • 2-5+ Years of experience in B2B sales, account management, or channel/partner management
  • Strong understanding of business processes (finance, sales, inventory, manufacturing, etc.) and variety of business models (service companies, retail companies)
  • Proven track record in driving revenue and growth through parners or resellers
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  • Analytical and KPI-driven mindset — comfortable working with numbers, forecasts, and performance dashboards.
  • Proactive and organized, with a high sense of ownership and accountability.
  • Highly proactive, result-oriented, and comfortable owning sales targets.

Nice to Have:

  • Understanding of ERP implementation lifecycles and common partner challenges
  • Ability to lead workshops or training session.
  • Immediate availability

company.description: PT Kresna Reksa Finance adalah perusahaan swasta yang bergerak di bidang lembaga pembiayaan konsumen (multifinance). Perusahaan ini berfokus pada penyediaan fasilitas pinjaman dana tunai dengan agunan (jaminan) BPKB kendaraan dan Serifikat Rumah
company.name: PT Kresna Reksa Finance

companyInfo.description: PT Kresna Reksa Finance adalah perusahaan swasta yang bergerak di bidang lembaga pembiayaan konsumen (multifinance). Perusahaan ini berfokus pada penyediaan fasilitas pinjaman dana tunai dengan agunan (jaminan) BPKB kendaraan dan Serifikat Rumah
companyInfo.name: PT Kresna Reksa Finance

jobs.description:
1. Akuisisi Nasabah

Mencari dan mendapatkan nasabah baru sesuai target perusahaan

Melakukan kegiatan marketing (canvassing, referensi, database, dll)

Menjalin relasi dengan pihak eksternal untuk memperluas jaringan

2. Analisa & Survey Kredit

Melakukan survey kelayakan calon nasabah (data, usaha, jaminan)

Menganalisa kemampuan bayar calon nasabah

Memastikan data yang diberikan valid dan sesuai fakta di lapangan

3. Proses Pengajuan Pembiayaan

Membantu nasabah dalam proses pengajuan kredit

Melengkapi dan memastikan dokumen aplikasi sesuai ketentuan

Berkoordinasi dengan tim internal (credit analyst / admin)

4. Monitoring & Maintenance Nasabah

Menjaga hubungan baik dengan nasabah (existing customer)

Melakukan follow up pembayaran agar tetap lancar

Mengedukasi nasabah terkait kewajiban pembayaran

5. Penagihan (Collection Ringan)

Melakukan reminder kepada nasabah yang mendekati jatuh tempo

Menangani keterlambatan pembayaran awal (soft collection)

6. Pencapaian Kinerja

Mencapai target yang telah ditentukan perusahaan

Membuat laporan aktivitas harian, mingguan, dan bulanan

7. Kepatuhan & Prosedur

Menjalankan pekerjaan sesuai SOP dan kebijakan perusahaan

Menjaga integritas serta kerahasiaan data nasabah

company.description: PT Serasi Autoraya (SERA) merupakan bagian dari Grup usaha PT Astra International Tbk yang saat ini telah dikenal luas sebagai salah satu perusahaan layanan transportasi, bisnis lelang, dan logistik terbesar di Indonesia. Sejak berdiri pada 1990 hingga saat ini, SERA telah bertransformasi menjadi perusahaan dengan lini bisnis yang lebih beragam dan terus berkembang.
company.name: PT. Serasi Autoraya (SERA)

companyInfo.description: PT Serasi Autoraya (SERA) merupakan bagian dari Grup usaha PT Astra International Tbk yang saat ini telah dikenal luas sebagai salah satu perusahaan layanan transportasi, bisnis lelang, dan logistik terbesar di Indonesia. Sejak berdiri pada 1990 hingga saat ini, SERA telah bertransformasi menjadi perusahaan dengan lini bisnis yang lebih beragam dan terus berkembang.
companyInfo.name: PT. Serasi Autoraya (SERA)

jobs.description:
• Menganalisa potensi pasar dan segmentasi buyer.
  • Melakukan pencarian buyer baru untuk berbagai kategori barang lelang (otomotif dan non otomotif)
  • Membangun dan menjaga hubungan baik dengan buyer existing maupun potensial.
  • Melakukan edukasi terkait proses lelang kepada calon buyer.
  • Mengelola database buyer dan memastikan data buyer selalu update.
  • Melakukan follow up terhadap buyer untuk meningkatkan partisipasi dalam lelang.
  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim operasional dan marketing terkait kebutuhan pasar dan target penjualan.
  • Membuat laporan aktivitas acquisition dan pencapaian target buyer
jobs.name: Buyer Acquisition
jobs.qualifications:
• Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang penjualan.
  • Memiliki minat besar dalam karier di bidang sales.
  • Berorientasi pada target dan memiliki motivasi tinggi
  • Memiliki keterampilan komunikasi, negosiasi, dan penjualan yang kuat

company.description:
Pada 14 Juli 2014, BTPN Syariah resmi terdaftar sebagai Bank
Umum Syariah ke-12 di Indonesia. Bank pertama di Indonesia yang melayani masyarakat pra-sejahtera, melalui pemberdayaan perempuan yang berbasis perbankan syariah.
Bank Syariah Swasta Terbaik dalam 8 tahun berturut-turut.
company.name: BTPN Syariah

jobs.description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

1. Tenaga profesional yang mengunjungi dan membina para perempuan prasejahtera di daerah sesuai penempatan untuk memberikan pendampingan usaha serta literasi keuangan;

2. Mengajarkan pengelolaan keuangan sederhana, disiplin menabung, dan memastikan cicilan berjalan lancar;

3. Memberikan modal usaha kepada nasabah dengan sistem pembiayaan kelompok tanpa agunan;

4. Mendengarkan kebutuhan nasabah dan memberikan solusi terbaik.

1. Perempuan

2. Usia 18 - 33 tahun

3. Pendidikan min SMA/SMK Sederajat, D3, hingga S1

4. Senang bersosialisasi dan bertemu banyak orang

1. Gaji Pokok UMP

Pada 14 Juli 2014, BTPN Syariah resmi terdaftar sebagai Bank
Umum Syariah ke-12 di Indonesia. Bank pertama di Indonesia yang melayani masyarakat pra-sejahtera, melalui pemberdayaan perempuan yang berbasis perbankan syariah.
Bank Syariah Swasta Terbaik dalam 8 tahun berturut-turut.
companyInfo.name: BTPN Syariah

jobs.description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

1. Tenaga profesional yang mengunjungi dan membina para perempuan prasejahtera di daerah sesuai penempatan untuk memberikan pendampingan usaha serta literasi keuangan;

2. Mengajarkan pengelolaan keuangan sederhana, disiplin menabung, dan memastikan cicilan berjalan lancar;

3. Memberikan modal usaha kepada nasabah dengan sistem pembiayaan kelompok tanpa agunan;

4. Mendengarkan kebutuhan nasabah dan memberikan solusi terbaik.

addressComponents.addressLine_1: 101A, Jalan Pandanaran, Pekunden Kel., Semarang Tengah

jobs.name: Community Officer Semarang
jobs.qualifications:
Persyaratan:

1. Perempuan

2. Usia 18 - 33 tahun

3. Pendidikan min SMA/SMK Sederajat, D3, hingga S1

4. Senang bersosialisasi dan bertemu banyak orang

Benefit:

1. Gaji Pokok UMP

2. THR 2x Gaji Pokok

3. Insentif

4. Jaminan Kesehatan

5. Wisma/Mess

6. Motor Manual

7. Program beasiswa sarjana S1

8. Hadiah perjalanan ke luar negeri

9. Berkesempatan ibadah Umroh

company.description: PT Bussan Auto Finance ("BAF") is one of the leading financing company in Indonesia focusing on new Yamaha brand motorcycle, used motorcycle, Sharia financing, Car, Multi-Products(electronics & home appliances), agricultural machinery, Pradana, and Adidana. In running its business, BAF is registered and supervised by Financial Service Authority (OJK) and member of Indonesia Financing Company Association (APPI) and Credit Bureau. With more than 24 years of existence, BAF has served 8.2 million customers and is supported by ± 8.200 employees in 248 locations across Indonesia.
company.name: Bussan Auto Finance

companyInfo.description: PT Bussan Auto Finance ("BAF") is one of the leading financing company in Indonesia focusing on new Yamaha brand motorcycle, used motorcycle, Sharia financing, Car, Multi-Products(electronics & home appliances), agricultural machinery, Pradana, and Adidana. In running its business, BAF is registered and supervised by Financial Service Authority (OJK) and member of Indonesia Financing Company Association (APPI) and Credit Bureau. With more than 24 years of existence, BAF has served 8.2 million customers and is supported by ± 8.200 employees in 248 locations across Indonesia.
companyInfo.name: Bussan Auto Finance

jobs.description:
Responsibilities:

  • Monitoring and recording the entry and exit of IT assets (hardware, software, application systems) and documented them in the database/system.
  • Manage the asset life cycle process, from purchasing, installation, maintenance, and asset disposal/disposal.
  • Follow up the expiration date and ensure all software/hardware is not expired.
  • Perform memo approval processes and monitor the PKS (Work Agreement) for IT assets.
  • Communicate with internal and vendors regarding IT assets.
  • Prepare weekly and monthly reports related to the asset life cycle process.
jobs.name: IT Asset Management Staff
jobs.qualifications:
Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Information System, Computer Science, IT, or related field with a minimum of 1 year of relevant experience in system application and programming language
  • A detail oriented person with a background as an IT
  • Fluency in English is essential, Microsoft Office, and familiar with IT knowledge of hardware, software, and programming language
  • Passionate about IT asset administration (computer, hardware, server, and application) and data analysis
  • Willing to contract under Outsourcing

company.description: Odoo is a Belgium-based company with 19 offices and over 4,800+ employees worldwide. With a mission to improve efficiency and performance for every business, Odoo offers an all-in-one open-source software that includes 80+ business applications such as Sales, Accounting, Manufacturing, Inventory, and more. Flexible for businesses of all sizes and industries, and with prices 3x more affordable than traditional competitors (like SAP and Microsoft), Odoo has become the go-to choice for business owners in Indonesia!
company.name: Odoo

companyInfo.description: Odoo is a Belgium-based company with 19 offices and over 4,800+ employees worldwide. With a mission to improve efficiency and performance for every business, Odoo offers an all-in-one open-source software that includes 80+ business applications such as Sales, Accounting, Manufacturing, Inventory, and more. Flexible for businesses of all sizes and industries, and with prices 3x more affordable than traditional competitors (like SAP and Microsoft), Odoo has become the go-to choice for business owners in Indonesia!
companyInfo.name: Odoo

jobs.description:
Your responsibilities include:

  • Drive sales growth through implementing partners, ensuring they meet or exceed assigned revenue targets and KPIs.
  • Build and execute joint business plans with each partner — aligning on goals, sales strategies, and target markets.
  • Regularly review partner pipelines, identify opportunities, and provide guidance to accelerate deal closures.
  • Actively join partners in customer meetings, sales calls, demos, and other activities to support co-selling, product positioning, and negotiation with end clients.”
  • Monitor and report on partner sales performance, forecast accuracy, and activity levels.
  • Collaborate with the Partner Manager and internal teams (Sales, Marketing, Technical) to enable and empower partners for success.
  • Maintain high standards of partner performance — balancing support and accountability.
  • Represent the voice of partners internally, ensuring they have the right tools and resources to grow.

addressComponents.addressLine_1: Jalan Damai Foresta, Sampora Kel., Cisauk

jobs.name: Partner Growth & Enablement Executive
jobs.qualifications:
Must Have:

  • Min. Bachelor degree or higher
  • Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia
  • 2-5+ Years of experience in B2B sales, account management, or channel/partner management
  • Strong understanding of business processes (finance, sales, inventory, manufacturing, etc.) and variety of business models (service companies, retail companies)
  • Proven track record in driving revenue and growth through parners or resellers
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  • Analytical and KPI-driven mindset — comfortable working with numbers, forecasts, and performance dashboards.
  • Proactive and organized, with a high sense of ownership and accountability.
  • Highly proactive, result-oriented, and comfortable owning sales targets.

Nice to Have:

  • Understanding of ERP implementation lifecycles and common partner challenges
  • Ability to lead workshops or training session.
  • Immediate availability

company.description: PT Kresna Reksa Finance adalah perusahaan swasta yang bergerak di bidang lembaga pembiayaan konsumen (multifinance). Perusahaan ini berfokus pada penyediaan fasilitas pinjaman dana tunai dengan agunan (jaminan) BPKB kendaraan dan Serifikat Rumah
company.name: PT Kresna Reksa Finance

companyInfo.description: PT Kresna Reksa Finance adalah perusahaan swasta yang bergerak di bidang lembaga pembiayaan konsumen (multifinance). Perusahaan ini berfokus pada penyediaan fasilitas pinjaman dana tunai dengan agunan (jaminan) BPKB kendaraan dan Serifikat Rumah
companyInfo.name: PT Kresna Reksa Finance

jobs.description:
1. Akuisisi Nasabah

Mencari dan mendapatkan nasabah baru sesuai target perusahaan

Melakukan kegiatan marketing (canvassing, referensi, database, dll)

Menjalin relasi dengan pihak eksternal untuk memperluas jaringan

2. Analisa & Survey Kredit

Melakukan survey kelayakan calon nasabah (data, usaha, jaminan)

Menganalisa kemampuan bayar calon nasabah

Memastikan data yang diberikan valid dan sesuai fakta di lapangan

3. Proses Pengajuan Pembiayaan

Membantu nasabah dalam proses pengajuan kredit

Melengkapi dan memastikan dokumen aplikasi sesuai ketentuan

Berkoordinasi dengan tim internal (credit analyst / admin)

4. Monitoring & Maintenance Nasabah

Menjaga hubungan baik dengan nasabah (existing customer)

Melakukan follow up pembayaran agar tetap lancar

Mengedukasi nasabah terkait kewajiban pembayaran

5. Penagihan (Collection Ringan)

Melakukan reminder kepada nasabah yang mendekati jatuh tempo

Menangani keterlambatan pembayaran awal (soft collection)

6. Pencapaian Kinerja

Mencapai target yang telah ditentukan perusahaan

Membuat laporan aktivitas harian, mingguan, dan bulanan

7. Kepatuhan & Prosedur

Menjalankan pekerjaan sesuai SOP dan kebijakan perusahaan

Menjaga integritas serta kerahasiaan data nasabah

4. Monitoring & Maintenance Nasabah

Menjaga hubungan baik dengan nasabah (existing customer)

Melakukan follow up pembayaran agar tetap lancar

Mengedukasi nasabah terkait kewajiban pembayaran

5. Penagihan (Collection Ringan)

Melakukan reminder kepada nasabah yang mendekati jatuh tempo

Menangani keterlambatan pembayaran awal (soft collection)

6. Pencapaian Kinerja

Mencapai target yang telah ditentukan perusahaan

Membuat laporan aktivitas harian, mingguan, dan bulanan

7. Kepatuhan & Prosedur

Menjalankan pekerjaan sesuai SOP dan kebijakan perusahaan

Menjaga integritas serta kerahasiaan data nasabah

addressComponents.addressLine_1: 57, RT05/RW03, Jalan Jend Sudirman, Senayan Kel., Kebayoran Baru

jobs.name: ACCOUNT OFFICER CAB.TANGERANG
jobs.qualifications:
• Usia 24 – 40 tahun.
  • Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK Sederajat.
  • Memiliki pengalaman CMO pada perusahaan pembiayaan dana tunai/leasback(multifinance)..
  • Berdomisili di area Cibubur dan sekitarnya.
  • Memiliki jaringan yang luas di bidang pembiayaan menjadi nilai tambah.

company.description: PT Serasi Autoraya (SERA) merupakan bagian dari Grup usaha PT Astra International Tbk yang saat ini telah dikenal luas sebagai salah satu perusahaan layanan transportasi, bisnis lelang, dan logistik terbesar di Indonesia. Sejak berdiri pada 1990 hingga saat ini, SERA telah bertransformasi menjadi perusahaan dengan lini bisnis yang lebih beragam dan terus berkembang.
company.name: PT. Serasi Autoraya (SERA)

companyInfo.description: PT Serasi Autoraya (SERA) merupakan bagian dari Grup usaha PT Astra International Tbk yang saat ini telah dikenal luas sebagai salah satu perusahaan layanan transportasi, bisnis lelang, dan logistik terbesar di Indonesia. companyInfo.name: PT. Serasi Autoraya (SERA)

jobs.description:
• Menganalisa potensi pasar dan segmentasi buyer.
  • Melakukan pencarian buyer baru untuk berbagai kategori barang lelang (otomotif dan non otomotif)
  • Membangun dan menjaga hubungan baik dengan buyer existing maupun potensial.
  • Melakukan edukasi terkait proses lelang kepada calon buyer.
  • Mengelola database buyer dan memastikan data buyer selalu update.
  • Melakukan follow up terhadap buyer untuk meningkatkan partisipasi dalam lelang.
  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim operasional dan marketing terkait kebutuhan pasar dan target penjualan.
  • Membuat laporan aktivitas acquisition dan pencapaian target buyer
jobs.name: Buyer Acquisition
jobs.qualifications:
• Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang penjualan.
  • Memiliki minat besar dalam karier di bidang sales.
  • Berorientasi pada target dan memiliki motivasi tinggi
  • Memiliki keterampilan komunikasi, negosiasi, dan penjualan yang kuat

company.description:
Pada 14 Juli 2014, BTPN Syariah resmi terdaftar sebagai Bank
Umum Syariah ke-12 di Indonesia. Bank pertama di Indonesia yang melayani masyarakat pra-sejahtera, melalui pemberdayaan perempuan yang berbasis perbankan syariah.
Bank Syariah Swasta Terbaik dalam 8 tahun berturut-turut.
company.name: BTPN Syariah

companyInfo.description:
Pada 14 Juli 2014, BTPN Syariah resmi terdaftar sebagai Bank
Umum Syariah ke-12 di Indonesia. Bank pertama di Indonesia yang melayani masyarakat pra-sejahtera, melalui pemberdayaan perempuan yang berbasis perbankan syariah.
Bank Syariah Swasta Terbaik dalam 8 tahun berturut-turut.
companyInfo.name: BTPN Syariah

jobs.description:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

1. Tenaga profesional yang mengunjungi dan membina para perempuan prasejahtera di daerah sesuai penempatan untuk memberikan pendampingan usaha serta literasi keuangan;

2. Mengajarkan pengelolaan keuangan sederhana, disiplin menabung, dan memastikan cicilan berjalan lancar;

3. Memberikan modal usaha kepada nasabah dengan sistem pembiayaan kelompok tanpa agunan;

4. Mendengarkan kebutuhan nasabah dan memberikan solusi terbaik.
